name: ran-commit
description: AI-powered git commit message generator using claude-cli, perplexity, vscode

commands.title: Ran Commit: Store Perplexity API Key

ranCommit.method.description: How to generate commit messages. `auto` tries vscode.lm first, falls back to Claude CLI. `vscode-lm` requires a model provider (e.g. GitHub Copilot). `claude-cli` requires the `claude` CLI on PATH. `perplexity` uses the Perplexity API (set key via 'Git Commit: Store Perplexity API Key').

ranCommit.modelFamily.description: Model family/name to use. For `vscode-lm`/`auto`: filters available models (e.g. `gpt-4o`, `claude-sonnet`). For `claude-cli`: passed as the model family. For `perplexity`: the model name portion of `vendor/model` (e.g. `sonar`; default `perplexity/sonar`). Leave empty to use the default.

ranCommit.modelVendor.description: Model vendor to use. For `vscode-lm`/`auto`: filters available models (e.g. `copilot`, `anthropic`). For `perplexity`: the vendor prefix in `vendor/model` (e.g. `perplexity`). Not used by `claude-cli`. Leave empty to use the default.

scripts.compile: pnpm run check-types && pnpm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: pnpm run check-types && pnpm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: pnpm run compile-tests && pnpm run compile && pnpm run lint
